'''Chaasch''' was the eighth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Suolriep system/Legends|Suolriep system]]. Its eighth moon was [[New Kisge]].

==Behind the scenes==
It has been noted that instances of "Sulorine" as included in [[Secrets of the Sisar Run]] were misspellings of Suolriep.
